cells.rationale: Early proof-point module custody move that must preserve load-bearing reset-time/envelope-compatibility invariants under toolchain drift — contract-shaped work where a dropped rationale silently breaks the wire contract.

Collapses the spawn seam and deletes a config-resolver family across runner/db/daemon with subtle launchd cwd/PATH correctness and a daemon worker-gate change — contract-touching with real blast radius.
Introduces a new fail-open config schema replacing three surfaces with id validation, import-graph cold-start hazards, and an intended behavior change — new-pattern contract work.
Bounded subverb added by mirroring an established split pattern, but the descriptor tree's final shape is uncertain (sequenced behind a convergence epic), so keep opus over a literal-minded tier.
Well-specified, low-blast-radius, reversible doc/ADR revision with exact line refs where sonnet's precise spec-following fits and the genre discipline is clearly stated.
